description_long: This is a modern single-story house with a flat roof and an open, spacious layout. The structure features large, white exterior walls with several wide windows and sliding glass doors, allowing for ample natural light. The backyard includes a blue swimming pool, a wooden deck, and a pergola-covered patio area, providing outdoor leisure space. The front of the house has a small green lawn and a paved entryway, with a clear main entrance. The interior appears to be divided into multiple rooms, including living, dining, and kitchen areas, with visible furniture and fixtures. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a backyard pool, and a pergola patio. The design features clean lines, white walls, and open indoor-outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entryway, front lawn, and a glimpse into the open-plan living area.
description_view_1: This side view showcases the length of the house, the backyard pool, and the pergola patio area.
description_view_2: The rear view focuses on the swimming pool, wooden deck, and the pergola, with the house's back facade visible.
description_view_3: This view displays the opposite side of the house, showing the pool, patio, and additional green space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a paved path, minimal steps, and a simple modern door, no porch or columns
